concerns.text: Thermal conductivity data source is described as 'CSV files provided by the project team' from 'peer-reviewed literature compilations (e.g., NIST Materials Data Repository)' without specific dataset names, URLs, or accession IDs. Constitution Principle VII requires thermal conductivity values to be sourced from 'Materials Project thermal properties endpoint or the NIST Materials Data Repository' with exact dataset version recorded in data/metadata.yaml. The plan should specify which exact dataset(s) will be used.

FR-010 requires ≥50 unique perovskite compositions from 'peer-reviewed experimental literature compilations or the NIST experimental database' but does not cite specific dataset names or URLs. Planning docs should cite the source/reference for data resources rather than asserting counts. Add specific dataset identifiers (e.g., NIST repository tag, literature compilation DOI) to enable provenance verification.
